code:
stateDiagram-v2
playerCount: Ask how many players
establishBonusPoints: Establish the Zap and Bonus

[IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic] --> playerCount
playerCount --> establishBonusPoints

establishBonusPoints --> EstablishBust
state EstablishBust {IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] --> rollBust

	rollBust --> awardBustChoice

	awardBustChoice --> awardBustPoints: If exact match
	awardBustChoice --> offerHighRiskChoice: If not exact match

	offerHighRiskChoice --> offerHighRisk: If 2-6
	offerHighRiskChoice --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode]: If >= 7

	awardBustPoints --> offerHighRiskChoice: If >= 7

	offerHighRisk --> highRiskChoice

	highRiskChoice --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: If declined

}

EstablishBust --> PressLoop

state PressLoop {IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> rollPress
	rollPress --> rollPress: As many times as they want

	rollPress --> goBust: If matches Bust dice
	rollPress --> awardPoints: If chooses "Stop"
	rollPress --> evilOffer: If rolled 2x more than expected

	goBust --> nextPlayer
	awardPoints --> nextPlayer
	evilOffer --> evilOfferChoice
	evilOfferChoice --> rollEvilOffer: If accepted
	evilOfferChoice --> awardPoints: If rejected

	rollEvilOffer --> displayBustEvilOffer
	rollEvilOffer --> displayWinEvilOffer
	displayBustEvilOffer --> nextPlayer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> rollPress
	displayWinEvilOffer --> evilOffer
	displayWinEvilOffer --> awardPoints

	nextPlayer --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
}

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个IoT工业场景下的状态机，核心逻辑是围绕一个类似"Zap"的游戏机制。首先要有PLC逻辑层来询问玩家人数，然后建立Zap和Bonus点数。
明白，所以PLC逻辑启动后先进入"询问玩家人数"状态，然后流转到"建立Zap和Bonus"。接下来是不是要进入一个叫EstablishBust的复合状态？我注意到这里涉及EdgeNode。
对，EstablishBust是个关键复合状态。里面EdgeNode触发rollBust，然后根据结果分支：精确匹配就awardBustPoints，不匹配就进入高风险选择。这里有个特殊规则——如果掷出7要回到EdgeNode重新roll。
好的，EstablishBust结构我画好了。高风险选择分支里，2-6进入offerHighRisk，玩家拒绝的话要流向MQTT Broker。然后整个EstablishBust结束后进入PressLoop，这里应该是主游戏循环？
PressLoop是核心循环，由ActuatorController驱动。玩家可以rollPress任意多次，但如果匹配了Bust骰子就goBust，主动选择Stop则awardPoints。还有个特殊机制：如果roll出预期值的两倍，触发evilOffer。
evilOffer的分支我理一下：玩家接受就进入rollEvilOffer，然后可能显示displayBustEvilOffer或displayWinEvilOffer；拒绝则直接awardPoints。displayWinEvilOffer之后可以回到rollPress继续、再次触发evilOffer、或者直接awardPoints，对吗？
完全正确。另外goBust、awardPoints、displayBustEvilOffer这些终点都要流向nextPlayer，然后nextPlayer再回到PLC逻辑层，形成完整闭环。
整个状态机完成了。我确认一下闭环：PLC启动→询问人数→建立Bonus→EstablishBust→PressLoop循环→各种分支→nextPlayer→回到PLC。所有IoT组件EdgeNode、MQTT Broker、ActuatorController都嵌入在对应状态里了。
